text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: It's finally time for the junior G1<n>Hopeful Stakes!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
It's the end of the year, and all these<n>fans are
gathered here at Nakayama<n>Racecourse to find out
who the new<n>star racers will be!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, I'm so excited! Whoever wins<n>here is going
to make her mark on<n>history!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, but we all know who we should<n>be keeping
an eye on in next year's<n>Classics!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: It's obviously Biwa Hayahide and<n>Winning Ticket!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
You hear them? Ticket and Hayahide<n>are all
anyone's talking about.

Winning Ticket and Biwa Hayahide<n>have done
quite well in their races<n>too.

Even as junior-year racers, they run<n>exceptionally
well. It's only natural<n>that expectations are high
for them.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
And they'll be going head-to-head in<n>the first
Classic Triple Crown race,<n>the Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Everyone's going on about whether<n>Ticket or
Hayahide will get the first<n>crown.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
choice_data_list: You've gotta show them you're no pushover!
